home.feature.events.title: Events & Festivals
home.feature.events.description: Join us for cultural celebrations, festivals, and community gatherings throughout the year.
home.feature.unity.title: Community Unity
home.feature.unity.description: Connect with fellow community members and build lasting friendships and relationships.
home.feature.heritage.title: Cultural Heritage
home.feature.heritage.description: Preserve and celebrate our rich cultural traditions, language, and heritage.
home.upcomingEventsDescription: Don't miss out on our exciting upcoming events!
home.ctaDescription: Be part of something special. Connect with your roots, celebrate your culture, and make lasting memories.
about.heroSubtitle: Learn more about our community and mission
about.teamSubtitle: Meet the dedicated individuals who make our community thrive
about.joinDescription: Join us in our mission to build a stronger, more connected community. Whether you want to volunteer, attend events, or become a member, we'd love to hear from you!
events.heroSubtitle: Join us for exciting cultural celebrations and community gatherings
events.subscribeDescription: Subscribe to get updates on our events and never miss out on community celebrations!
events.guideline.arrival: Please arrive 15 minutes before the event start time
events.guideline.attire: Traditional attire is encouraged but not mandatory
events.guideline.photography: Photography and videography are allowed for personal use
events.guideline.queries: For any queries, please contact us through our contact page
contact.heroSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you!
contact.getInTouchDescription: Have questions about our events, membership, or want to get involved? We're here to help! Reach out to us through any of the following channels.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
contact.membershipDescription: Join our vibrant community and be part of something special. Enjoy exclusive benefits, participate in events, and connect with fellow community members.
contact.benefit.priorityAccess: Priority access to all events and programs
contact.membershipNote: Contact us to learn more about membership options and fees.
contact.faq.membership.question: How can I become a member?
contact.faq.membership.answer: Simply fill out the contact form above with "Membership Inquiry" as the subject, and our team will get back to you with all the details and registration process.
contact.faq.nonMembers.question: Are non-members allowed to attend events?
contact.faq.nonMembers.answer: Yes! Most of our events are open to everyone. However, members enjoy priority booking and discounted rates on event tickets.
contact.faq.volunteer.question: How can I volunteer?
contact.faq.volunteer.answer: We're always looking for enthusiastic volunteers! Contact us through the form above with "Volunteer Opportunities" as the subject, and we'll connect you with our volunteer coordinator.
